headline: UnitedHealth Under the Microscope After Berkshire Pulls the Plug
summary: UNH is under the spotlight after Berkshire Hathaway's 13F reveals it exited its entire stake, sparking surprise selling and fresh scrutiny on headwinds.

raw.headline: UnitedHealth Under the Microscope After Berkshire Pulls the Plug

headline: AI Is Coming for Pharmacy Benefit Managers: Potential Winners and Losers
summary: Pharmacy benefit managers (PBMs) sit at the chokepoint of U.S. drug distribution. They negotiate rebates, design formularies, adjudicate claims, and steer patient adherence. Modern artificial intelligence (AI) is designed to compress each of these high-volume, rules-driven processes. As autonomous prior authorization, real-time formulary optimization, and AI-driven rebate analytics scale, the Big Three PBMs face a ... AI Is Coming for Pharmacy Benefit Managers: Potential Winners and Losers
